summary: Phase 2.1 Readability + Type Clarity for Additional Offers - Frontend Testing PASSED. All 9 features verified: type badges (Основна blue / Допълнителна amber), type filter buttons with counts, filtering functionality, offer detail header badges, source info display, KSS line notes in grouped view, NeedsRevision as 'Корекция', project page extra offers block with amber border, and amber offer_no color.

issues: Note display only works in grouped view mode - flat view doesn't show notes under activity names. The code at line 842-843 shows notes only in grouped view.

critical_code_review_comments: OffersListPage.js correctly implements type badges with proper colors (blue for Основна, amber for Допълнителна)
Type filter (data-testid='type-filter') shows counts: Всички / Основни (60) / Допълнителни (4)
OfferEditorPage.js header shows type badge with proper styling
Source info 'Създадена от N допълнителни СМР' displays correctly in offer header for extra offers
ProjectDetailPage.js extra offers block has amber border (border-amber-500/20) and amber offer_no text (text-amber-400)
